nav.whatsapp_msg: Hi, I'd like to learn more about Revow!

hero.sub: AI-powered revenue intelligence that maps your entire revenue cycle, detects invisible leaks, and prescribes actions — customized to your business.

typewriter: detect revenue leaks before they hurt
get intelligent alerts when it matters
talk to your data through AI

problem.label: The Problem
problem.h2: Companies lose 20–30% of revenue to process inefficiency
problem.sub: Fragmented data, passive dashboards, and manual processes create blind spots that drain revenue silently — every single day.

items.title: Data Silos
items.desc: Misaligned KPIs across Sales, Marketing, and CS mask inefficiency. A campaign leading in MQLs often destroys CAC without converting.

items.title: Passive Tools
items.desc: Traditional BI is a rearview mirror. It shows what happened but fails to diagnose where operations broke or how to fix them in real time.

items.title: Manual Diagnosis
items.desc: 90% of revenue leaks aren't found by human analysis. Manual search always loses to the speed of daily operations.

platform.label: The Platform
platform.sub: Three layers working together to see, understand, and protect your revenue — autonomously.

layers.title: Data Layer
layers.subtitle: Connect
layers.desc: Integrates your legacy sources (ERP, CRM, BigQuery, APIs), organizing and validating data integrity in real time. Every signal captured, nothing lost.

layers.title: Intelligence Layer
layers.subtitle: Understand
layers.desc: The brain of the system. Our proprietary revenue ontology translates your business complexity into a validated formal model — turning loose concepts into observable, actionable states.

layers.title: Delivery Layer
layers.subtitle: Act
layers.desc: Active dashboards with action prescriptions and multi-agent AI Copilots that interact directly with your front line — via platform, WhatsApp, or API.

solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.h2: See what your revenue is really doing

items.title: Revenue Monitoring
items.desc: Real-time hourly tracking with PACE methodology — four curves that replace naive benchmarking with directional precision.

items.title: Funnel Intelligence
items.desc: End-to-end conversion with baseline, target, and trend detection. Know where value is created and where it leaks.

items.title: Alert Engine
items.desc: Every leak is classified by type and severity. Your team knows exactly what to do, not just that something is wrong.

items.title: Revenue Copilot
items.desc: Ask questions in natural language — get answers grounded in your real data, with anti-hallucination safeguards built in.

how.label: How It Works
how.sub: Not a template. A custom revenue operating system engineered around how your business actually works.

steps.title: Consult
steps.desc: We study your revenue operations, map every touchpoint, and design a custom intelligence layer tailored to your business.

steps.title: Connect
steps.desc: We integrate your data sources into our proprietary revenue ontology — the brain that understands your business as a system.

steps.title: Protect
steps.desc: Your custom platform monitors 24/7, detects leaks, sends smart alerts, and prescribes actions via dashboard, WhatsApp, or API.

items.title: Custom-built for your revenue cycle
items.desc: Every deployment is engineered around your specific revenue operations — not a one-size-fits-all template.

items.title: Proprietary revenue ontology
items.desc: A formal model that understands revenue as a system: states, transitions, events, and diagnostic rules.

items.title: AI that knows when NOT to act
items.desc: Circuit Breakers evaluate data confidence and refuse to recommend when trust is low. Anti-hallucination by design.

items.title: Proven across industries
items.desc: The same intelligence engine validated in education, fuel retail, telecom, and services — because revenue follows universal patterns.

cta.sub: Talk directly to our team. No forms, no waiting.

blog.label: Blog
blog.sub: Insights on Revenue Intelligence, systemic management, and the invisible losses draining your revenue.
blog.ebook_cta_sub: Learn about the 4 types of invisible revenue losses and how to detect them before it's too late.

ebook.sub: Your company loses revenue in ways no dashboard shows. Learn to identify and stop the 4 systemic loss patterns before they erode your margins.
bullets: Understand the Loss Typology: Leak, Break, Bottleneck, and Degradation
Real cases from education, retail, energy, and telecom
A diagnostic framework to map your own blind spots
The Revenue Engineering approach to systemic visibility

alerts.label: Alert Engine
alerts.title: Smart Alerts — Live
msgs: Conversion drop detected in Stage 2 → Stage 3. Down 4.2pp vs baseline. Investigate qualification criteria.
To hit target of 2,385 units, 19,011 more leads needed. Required pace: 317/business day.
Weekly conversion trending up — 3.3% avg over last 4 weeks. Maintain current strategy.
Revenue stable at +0.60pp vs D-364. Focus efforts on top-of-funnel volume for maximum impact.
